title: Melting British Thai Cheese Lasagna
description: A rich and flavorful lasagna dish that combines the best of British and Thai cuisine, featuring Thai holy basil krapao and ayurvedic rajasic friendly ingredients, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the tadka spice blend, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the chopped thai holy basil krapao to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese, salt, and black pepper, mixing well.
Add the cooked thai holy basil krapao mixture to the cheese mixture and stir to combine.
Spread a layer of the ayurvedic rajasic friendly tomato sauce in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the tomato sauce.
Spread half of the cheese mixture over the noodles, followed by half of the remaining tomato sauce.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the remaining cheese mixture, and finally the remaining tomato sauce.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
